sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43492" key="eu)afro/ditos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐαφρόδῑτος</orth>, prob. <sense id="n43492.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπαφρ</ref> </xr>-, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.221</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
